info.name: Telemax External API Tests
info.description: 71 test cases. 8 folders. Auto token-refresh pre-script. Based on Documentation Review Guide 14 Apr 2026.

exec: // Auth folder: individual tests control token manually

pm.test('AUTH-02: expires_in >3600 (~86399)',()=>{const b=pm.response.json();pm.expect(b.expires_in,'OpenAPI spec incorrectly says 3600 — actual should be ~86399').to.be.above(3600);pm.expect(b.expires_in).to.be.closeTo(86399,600);});
console.log('WH-07: Verify delivery header X-Telemax-Signature: sha256=HMAC-SHA256(body,secret)');
console.log('WH-12 MANUAL: Retry backoff: 30s,2m,15m,1h,6h. Max 5 retries/24h. Requires controllable callback endpoint.');

item.name: 4. VIN / Vehicle Details Lookup
item.description: POST /api/GetVehicleDetails — query params: id, vin, imei (min 1 required)

exec: pm.test('VIN-07: 404 not 403',()=>pm.response.to.have.status(404),'Must 404 to prevent VIN enumeration');

item.name: 5. Position Data + Fuel Level
item.description: Validates new fuelLevelVolume on position endpoints

item.name: POS-03 No volumetric sensor → null not 0

exec: pm.test('POS-03: null not 0 for no-sensor',()=>{const v=pm.response.json().fuelLevelVolume;if(v===0)pm.expect.fail('Must be null for no-sensor vehicle, not 0 — null=no sensor, 0=empty tank');pm.expect(v).to.satisfy(x=>x===null||x>0);});
pm.test('POS-04: fuelLevel still present',()=>pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('fuelLevel','Must not be removed'));
pm.test('POS-07: ConnectionStrengh (intentional typo) present',()=>pm.expect(pm.response.json(),'Intentional misspelling — must NOT be renamed').to.have.property('ConnectionStrengh'));
pm.test('POS-08: UserTimeFormated (intentional typo) present',()=>pm.expect(pm.response.json(),'Intentional misspelling — must NOT be renamed').to.have.property('UserTimeFormated'));

item.name: 6. Alert Management
item.description: POST /api/SetAlertAsRead — KNOWN BUG: isRead=false is no-op

exec: pm.test('ALERT-02 [REGRESSION BUG]: isRead=false should unread',()=>{const b=pm.response.json();if(b.isRead===true){console.warn('KNOWN BUG: isRead=false is no-op — alert still read');}else if(b.isRead===false){pm.expect(b.isRead).to.equal(false,'Bug fixed!');}});

item.name: 7. Engine Disable / Enable Commands
item.description: SAFETY CRITICAL: engine disable while moving must return 422

exec: pm.test('ENG-02 ⚠️ SAFETY CRITICAL: 422 for moving vehicle',()=>{if(pm.response.code===200)console.error('⚠️ SAFETY BUG: Engine disabled on moving vehicle! Must return 422');pm.expect(pm.response.code,'SAFETY: reject disable when speed>0').to.equal(422);});

item.name: 8. General & Cross-Cutting
item.description: API versioning, pagination, rate limits, security, performance

exec: pm.test('GEN-02: X-API-Version header',()=>{const v=pm.response.headers.get('X-API-Version');if(!v){console.warn('GEN-02: X-API-Version not yet implemented — middleware pending');}else{pm.expect(v).to.match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/,'YYYY-MM-DD format expected');}});
pm.test('GEN-04: internal not public (403/404)',()=>pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([403,404],'Internal ops endpoint must not be accessible'));
